response.justification: Bogdan's extensive experience as a Senior/Staff Software Engineer, particularly in full-stack development with TypeScript, React, and Node.js, aligns well with the role's requirements. His work on scalable platforms, API integrations, and cloud services (AWS, Kubernetes) demonstrates a strong technical foundation. While his background skews senior-level, his adaptability and pragmatic focus on clean architecture suggest he could thrive in a mid-level fullstack role.
strengths: Strong full-stack expertise with TypeScript, React, and Node.js, matching core job requirements
Proven experience in scalable systems, cloud services (AWS, Kubernetes), and API integrations
Demonstrated ability to learn quickly and adopt pragmatic solutions, aligning with the role's emphasis on clean architecture
concerns: Overqualified for the junior/mid-level role, which may lead to reduced long-term engagement
Limited direct experience with PostgreSQL (uses MongoDB primarily) and Nest.js (uses Ember.js/DLang in past projects)
High on-site presence requirement may conflict with his recent remote-heavy roles (Naver, Tencent)
